_core_paths_doc: BLUE crates per CLAUDE.md. ade_runtime is RED (shell); ade_testkit and ade_node are neither. ade_network has per-submodule BLUE scoping: mux::frame is BLUE; mux::transport and session are RED. ade_core::consensus (S-B1 onward) is BLUE under the already-listed crate prefix. Substring matches against absolute file paths.
_replay_cmd_doc: ade_testkit hosts boundary_replay, differential_*_replay, ledger_determinism, and stateful_replay test suites.
_replay_on_stop_doc: Disabled by default. Phase 4 test runtime is acceptable but full replay across all eras is not sub-second; flip to true once selective replay is introduced.
_clusters_dir_doc: Canonical IDD location. Currently contains PHASE4-N-D (in-flight). Closed Phase 0A/0B/1/2A/2C clusters remain at docs/completed/phase_*/ as historical anchors.
_cluster_id_format_doc: Cluster IDs use the PHASE<N>-<LETTER> convention (e.g., PHASE4-N-A, PHASE4-N-D). Slash commands pass the cluster id as the literal directory name under docs/clusters/.
_clusters_archive_dir_doc: Where /cluster-close moves cluster docs upon closure. Created on demand.
_planning_doc_doc: Active phase plan. /cluster-doc reads this when seeding new cluster docs (N-A, N-B, N-C, N-E, N-F).
_grounding_docs_dir_doc: Where the four grounding docs live: ade-CODEMAP.md, ade-SEAMS.md, ade-HEAD_DELTAS.md, ade-TRACEABILITY.md.
_head_deltas_baseline_doc: PHASE4-N-F-E close baseline (HEAD `cd2484f`, PHASE4-N-F-E S3b, 2026-05-31). HEAD_DELTAS for the N-F-E close narrated the `7de1462 → cd2484f` span (the PHASE4-N-F-E forge-tick cluster: S1 GREEN planner forge step, S2 RED self-accept-only forge-tick wiring into the relay loop, S3a forge-tick replay-equivalence, S3b single-epoch/KES fail-closed; plus `ffa76fc`, a test-only repair that un-redded the N-F-D `node_sync` test suite; 13 commits / 13 files / +2317 / -66). N-F-E is hermetic, single-epoch, self-accept-only: NO operator-key ingestion in --mode node, NO serve/broadcast/gossip of a forged block, NO durable apply/tip mutation by the forge, NO live peer / BA-02 / RO-LIVE claim (RO-LIVE-01 stays partial/operator-gated). NO BLUE crate changed (456 canonical types unchanged); DC-NODE-05 flipped declared→enforced at close. This baseline (`cd2484f`) is the N-F-E HEAD; the next cluster's /head-deltas measures its span from here. Bump on each cluster close to keep HEAD_DELTAS per-cluster and reviewable.
_normative_docs_doc: Files /traceability reads to extract rules. Tier-gate statement and its Tier 5 addendum carry the most enforced rules; the contract docs anchor cross-surface invariants; CLAUDE.md carries the commit-attribution policy.
_canonical_type_registry_doc: No separate canonical-type registry file yet; canonical-type rules live inline in the invariant registry under family T.
_invariant_registry_doc: Canonical, append-only invariant registry. Schema follows ziranity-v3's constitution_rule_registry.toml (base fields identical), additively compatible with the IDD template. 310 entries at HEAD across families T (true), CN (constraint network), DC (derived constraint), OP (operational), RO (release obligation).
_ci_dirs_doc: CI scripts live as `ci/ci_check_*.sh` (ci_dirs = ["ci"]). A non-gating .github/workflows/notify-atlas.yml dispatch workflow also exists (grounding-doc -> ade-atlas rebuild trigger), but it is not an Ade invariant gate; add '.github/workflows' to ci_dirs only if/when an actual invariant gate is added there.
